name: Copper & Glass
description_short: Copper & Glass Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union in Glassport, PA offering loans, share accounts, and financial services. Note: The company has closed and merged into OMEGA Federal Credit Union.
description_long: Copper & Glass Federal Credit Union was a federally-chartered, member-owned credit union located in Glassport, Pennsylvania. Based on their website, they positioned themselves as a community-focused financial institution with the motto "People Helping People." The organization provided traditional credit union services including share accounts, loans, and various member conveniences. However, the company is no longer operating as an independent institution. According to their Public Release Statement, Copper & Glass has closed its operations, with OMEGA Federal Credit Union assuming all loans, assets, and member shares. Members were notified that accounts would remain insured by the National Credit Union Share Insurance Fund (NCUA) with no interruption in services during the transition. The closure represents the end of what appears to have been a smaller regional credit union serving the Pittsburgh area. For consumers seeking to access Copper & Glass accounts or services, membership has been transferred to OMEGA Federal Credit Union. The original institution offered competitive loan rates, direct deposit services, money orders, and various consumer-friendly conveniences. Their physical location was 531 Monongahela Ave in Glassport, PA 15045, with limited operating hours (9:30 AM to 4 PM weekdays, extended to 5:30 PM on Fridays). Loan office hours were even more restricted, available only Tuesday and Thursday 10 AM to 4 PM for full services, with application-only availability other days. The credit union emphasized competitive rates and personalized service as differentiators within their regional market.
services: Loan products (consumer loans with competitive rates)
Credit card issuance (9.5% APR, 25-day grace period)
PA driver's license change of address applications
Vehicle valuation services (based on N.A.D.A. guide)
pros: NCUA insurance protection ensures member shares remain insured up to $250,000
Offered competitive loan rates in the region according to their marketing materials
Provided direct deposit (ACH) services for paycheck automation
Money orders available at affordable $2.00 flat rate
Credit card product offered with 9.5% APR and 25-day grace period on purchases
Payroll deduction options available for eligible members
Member-owned cooperative structure aligned member interests with financial outcomes
cons: Company has permanently closed and ceased independent operations; members transferred to OMEGA FCU
Extremely limited operating hours (9:30 AM-4 PM most days, 5:30 PM Friday only) made access inconvenient
Loan office hours severely restricted to Tuesday-Thursday only for full services
Small institution with limited product diversity compared to larger credit unions or banks
Minimal service details provided on website; many standard services not clearly documented
best_for: Former Copper & Glass members seeking to understand their account transition to OMEGA FCU
Pittsburgh-area residents researching the history of local credit union consolidations
Credit union members interested in understanding NCUA protections during institutional mergers
diagnosis: Copper & Glass Federal Credit Union is no longer an active institution—it has closed and merged into OMEGA Federal Credit Union. This profile is relevant only for former members seeking to understand what happened to their accounts (which remain NCUA-insured) or for those researching the institution's history. The primary caveat is that no new accounts or services can be opened with Copper & Glass; all member relationships have been transferred to OMEGA FCU.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Copper & Glass — Credit Union in GLASSPORT, PA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Copper & Glass — NCUA-insured credit union in GLASSPORT, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
